jsonLd.title: Croma is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Croma. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Croma:
Croma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
